What We Do
FULL PROPERTY
MAINTENANCE

One call handles it all. No job is too small — we take care of homes, apartments and real estate properties across Melbourne.

🚿
Bathroom Renovations

Full ensuite and bathroom renos — tiling, fixtures, waterproofing and finishing to a professional standard.

🖌️
Painting

Interior house and apartment repaints. Clean lines, quality finishes, minimal disruption.

🔨
Carpentry

Doors, handles, locks, timber repairs and custom fit-outs. Solid workmanship every time.

🪟
Plaster Repairs

Hole patching, crack repairs, ceilings and walls. Seamless results ready for painting.

🏠
Tiling

Floor and wall tiling for bathrooms, kitchens and living areas. Precise, level and durable.

🌿
Decking

Timber decking construction, repairs and sanding. Outdoor spaces done properly.

💧
Grouting & Leak Repairs

Re-grouting, caulking and leak diagnosis. We stop the problem at the source.

🏢
Real Estate Works

End-of-lease and investment property maintenance. Fast turnarounds for property managers.

Where We Work
MELBOURNE
WEST & NORTH

We're based in Melbourne and cover the north and western suburbs — from Geelong and the outer west through to the northern corridor. If you're in Melbourne's west or north, we come to you.
